name: Emeralde Credit Card

specialSpendRules.notes: Utility spends earn rewards capped at monthly spends of ₹80,000
Insurance spends earn rewards capped at monthly spends of ₹80,000
Grocery spends earn rewards capped at monthly spends of ₹40,000

domestic: Unlimited complimentary domestic and international lounge access for the primary cardholder; no spends criteria applies.
international: Unlimited complimentary domestic and international lounge access for the primary cardholder; no spends criteria applies.

additionalBenefits: Unlimited complimentary airport spa access in India
Buy one movie or event ticket and get up to ₹750 off on the second ticket up to 4 times every month on BookMyShow, subject to spending ₹25,000 in the preceding calendar quarter
Up to 4 complimentary golf rounds every month based on eligible spends
No cancellation charges on domestic flight and hotel bookings, up to ₹12,000 (twice every year)
Complimentary shopping voucher from Tata CLiQ worth ₹5,000 on your birthday (for American Express cardholders only)
Fuel surcharge waiver of 1% on transactions up to ₹4,000 at all fuel stations
additionalDetails: A transaction fee of 1% applies to utility payments exceeding ₹50,000 per month
internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-06
Official audit completed on 2026-06-06 using ICICI Bank Emeralde product page and notice revisions.
Annual fee of ₹12,000 is waived on spending ₹10 Lakhs or more in the previous anniversary year.
Base reward rate is 4 points per ₹100 spent on domestic and international retail transactions (1% return value).
Utility and insurance spends earn 1 point per ₹100 spent (0.25% return value) and are capped at monthly spends of ₹80,000.
Grocery spends earn rewards capped at monthly spends of ₹40,000.
Unlimited complimentary domestic and international lounge access for the primary cardholder; no spends criteria applies.
Complimentary golf rounds (up to 4 per month) require spending ₹50,000 per round in the previous calendar month.
BookMyShow BOGO offers up to ₹750 off twice/four times per month per variant, subject to spending ₹25,000 in the preceding quarter (effective April 1, 2026).
Cancel For Any Reason (CFAR) travel insurance covers up to ₹12,000 for flight/hotel cancellation charges (twice a year).
Tata CLiQ birthday voucher worth ₹5,000 is for American Express variant only.
Reward points can be transferred to Air India Maharaja Club at a 6:1 ratio, requiring a minimum of 2,000 points per transfer.
